title: Task
description: Schema for Task in Nuix ECC REST API

taskNum.description: 0-based index of tasks (jobs) to be run in this collection configuration

label.description:
user-defined label for this job.

Can be used as search criteria for jobs

impersonation.description: The enumeration value `None` or `Logged on User`

taskType.description:
The type of task.  One of `Collect`, `Relocate`, `Deploy` or `Launch`.
This value will determine which fields follow.

dates.description: array of one or more date criteria

hashes.description: array of hash values used to identify files to be collected

collectVolatile.description: Whether to collect volatile information,  When `false` the remaining fields are ignored

collectHandles.description: Whether to collect handles as part of the collection (collectVolatile must be `true`)

collectionScreenShots.description: Whether to capture screen shots of all windows (requires impersonation, collectVolatile must be `true`)

screenShotFormat.description: The graphic file format to save screen shot images.  One of `PNG` or `JPG` (collectScreenShots must be `true`)

collectRAM.description: When `true` saves a bit-for-bit image of the RAM

SmartMover.description: For a `Deploy` or `Relocate` task.  Specifies the copying or moving of files from one ECC Client to another

destinationFolder.description: folder on the destination computer where evidence is to be copied

moveOrCopy.description:
`Move` or `Copy`.

Either setting will copy files to the destination computer.  `Move` will delete evidence from the source after the copy is complete.
